center.name: Chocó–Darién moist forests
center.summary: Chocó–Darién moist forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Scarlet-and-white tanager，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: However, it can be found at elevations of up to in the Chocó of the Cordillera Central in Colombia. It inhabits stunted secondary growth on foothills, especially around dense, mossy woodland around ridge tops, steep canyon slopes, or landslide scars
